description_long: This object is a cylindrical lipstick with a ribbed, light gray plastic casing and a deep red lipstick bullet exposed in one of the tubes. The casing features a flower-like embossed pattern on the bottom of the cap, adding a subtle decorative touch. The lipstick bullet itself is smooth and conical, with a rich, glossy finish. The set includes both capped and uncapped tubes, as well as a cap placed separately, showcasing the twist-up mechanism. The overall design is modern and functional, with a focus on practicality and minimalism. The object appears compact and lightweight, suitable for carrying in a purse or pocket.
description: A compact, cylindrical lipstick with a ribbed light gray casing, deep red lipstick bullet, and a flower-embossed cap.
description_view_0: This view shows the lipstick with its cap removed, revealing the red bullet, and displays the flower-embossed cap base.
description_view_1: The lipstick bullet is seen from the side, with the cap and casing lying separately, highlighting the ribbed texture and the flat top of the lipstick.
description_view_2: The lipstick is shown with the cap off and lying nearby, emphasizing the cylindrical shape and decorative cap base.
description_view_3: The lipstick bullet is viewed from the front, with the cap and casing arranged to show the ribbed texture and the text on the cap base.
attribute_cap_design: Cylindrical, light gray, ribbed lower section, flower-embossed base, smooth upper section.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Flower-like geometric pattern embossed on the base of the cap in light gray.
